target: 25. That's Exactly Like Ushio

S-sorry!
Let me through, please!
(Damn... that girl...! Running off so quickly...!)
(Does she even understand the situation!? Her own funeral just finished...!)
Ah! Shinpei! I wanna do this, yo-yo fishing!!
...Y... Youuuuu...!!
Are you an idiot!! You're standing out way too much!!
You're standing out more, Shinpei. You're yelling so loudly.
Ah, more importantly, don't you think it smells really good? This definitely makes you want to eat takoyaki!!
This isn't the time for that!!!! What if someone we know sees us!? How am I supposed to explain you!?
Come here!!!
(Also... It's a bit late to mention it, but why is she in a swimsuit!!?)
Hey Shinpei! Why do we have to hide in a place like this? I'm hungry...
Mio and the others are here too, right? I wanna see them~~.
No way, absolutely not!!!
You know... Think about the situation a bit more...!! We just had your funeral the day before yesterday!!
But…
No buts! You're a Shadow--
Well, you might be a ghost or something, but... Everyone can see you!!
And you have a physical body! What the hell are you!
So… you mean I can't meet everyone?
Obviously!!
Muu...
A-Anyway, until the festival ends, hide here--
Shinpei, you <color=#GF_TIPS_056>idiot</color>----!!!!
You're just spouting a bunch of nonsense!! I'll twist that mouth of yours right off!!!
(You hit me before you even finished talking...)
(But... this reaction... It's exactly like Ushio...)
(I tried having a conversation with this Shadow of Ushio--)
(About what happened during the two years I left the island, and stories about our old memories...)
(Ushio's memories were accurate)
(It seems Shadows can copy not just appearance, but also personality, consciousness, and even memories.)
(However--)
Do you remember my favorite novelist?
Ryunosuke Nagumo, right! We went to see it when it became a movie.
...Aren't you worried about what happened to Shiori-chan?
Eh... What happened to Shiori-chan?
(For some reason, her memories regarding the Shadows are completely missing.)
(The story about Shiori Kobayakawa seeing a Shadow, and what happened on the day we went swimming...)
(She didn't even remember how she died herself.)
(It didn't look like she was acting to me. She "truly didn't know"... that's the expression she had...)
…No, it's nothing…
A phone call?
Yeah... it's Mio...
Let me talk!!
Ah!!!! Hey--
Hello? Mio?!
I-Idiot...! Give it back!!
Yes, it's me! It's me!
M-Mio!? It's me!! Yes!
Eh, um…
Just now... I thought I heard my sister's voice...
There's no way!! A-Are you okay?
...R-Right... Sorry... I must be losing it...
Shin-chan, where are you right now? The fireworks are over and the Umi-okuri has started. We're in the shrine grounds right now.
Ah, sorry...! I'm nearby, so I'll be right there.
...Really? Jeez... then hurry back. Everyone's worried about you.
Yeah, got it. I'll dash right over...
Yeah, see you.
*Sigh*...
What did Mio say!?
Never mind that!! You... stay out of sight!!!!
W-Wait, wait...! Don't push me like that!?
I'll come back for you later!! Just stay hidden here for a while...!
...*Sigh*.
You might not know this, but! Something really serious is happening right now--
You're the one who said it... Told me to protect Mio...!!
Huh?
I won't regret it.
...I have no idea what you're talking about.
I never said anything like that--
